category_sources: Official GitHub README says this is public domain source code for Dungeon, the mainframe game precursor to Zork.
source_facts.description: Dungeon modified from FORTRAN to C.
display_name_sources: Official repository is devshane/zork and README heading is DUNGEON (AKA Zork).
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best project documentation surface, with description and installation notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/devshane/zork; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README identifies Dungeon/Zork as a mainframe game and C port derived from FORTRAN source.
source_facts.license is public domain via Homebrew license reference.
